reason: The statement applies because the text describes the threat of great destruction brought upon Israel by the Midianites, Amalekites, and other tribes who destroyed their crops and livestock, leaving them greatly impoverished. The text also discusses the conflict between the Israelites and the Midianites, leading to a battle and the defeat of the Midianites by Gideon with the help of the Lord, resulting in the destruction of the Midianite army.
